name: Streuselkuchen (Crumb Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the topping: Mix together sugars, cinnamon, and flour. Cut in butter until the mixture is crumbly.
2. To make the cake: In a large bowl, combine 1 cup of flour, sugar, salt, and yeast. In a saucepan, heat milk and butter to about 120-130°F (50-55°C). Gradually add the warm milk mixture to the dry ingredients; beat until smooth. Add egg and another cup of flour, then beat for 2 minutes more.
3. Beat in additional flour until the batter is soft but stiff. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square cake pan. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
4. Let the cake rise in a warm place until it has doubled in size, about 1.5 hours.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes or until done. Makes one 9-inch square cake.
